name: Magic Battleground
author: Poki
description: Magic Battleground is a chaotic fighting game where you control a ragdoll warrior in wild magical battles! Move around the arena, use the environment to your advantage, punch enemies, and unleash powerful magic attacks to defeat your rivals. Choose your character, discover different abilities, and fight your way through one crazy battle after another. Ready to unleash your magic and dominate the battleground? How to play Magic Battleground? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Hit: X,Y,Z or left and right click Who created Magic Battleground? Magic Battleground is created by vessel. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Magic Battleground for free? You can play Magic Battleground for free on Poki. Can I play Magic Battleground on mobile devices and desktop? Magic Battleground can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
